title: DEP Observation
description: An observed event, trace element, or decision execution captured from an AI system. Observations are the atomic evidence unit in DEP.

event_id.description: Unique identifier for this observation event.

type.description: Event type: call, response, guardrail, human_action, decision, tool, retrieval, memory, error.

payload.description: Event-specific payload. Structure depends on event type.

context_refs.description: References to context artifacts applicable at this observation.

input_refs.description: References to input resources or prior observations.

output_refs.description: References to output resources or subsequent observations.
